title: SAM, CAM, Hogan Lovells act on Billdesk's acquisition of Worldline
description: IndiaIdeas.com Limited (Billdesk) has entered into a definitive agreement to acquire Worldline India’s payment businesses.Shardul Amarchand Mangaldas & Co advised Billdesk on this acquisition. The Firm advised on all aspects of the transaction, including legal due diligence on the target companies, structuring and negotiating transaction documentation, W&I insurance policy matters, and providing legal and regulatory advice in relation to the acquisition.
